prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate loading and hydration strategy

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories across all meals and snacks
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories to support endurance training
Includes specific hydration strategy with fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Plan is compact and covers exactly one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategy

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass through strength training with optimal protein distribution around workouts

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with at least 4 meals/snacks
Total daily protein meets 1.5g per kg body weight (135g minimum)
Includes pre-workout and post-workout meals with appropriate timing and macros
All meals are vegetarian-compliant and practical to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-training athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein intake (1.5g per lb body weight) with specific meal timing around workouts

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain energy and performance for soccer training and match

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers one full day with 3-4 meals
All meals are vegan with complete protein sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds, whole grains)
Includes iron-rich foods (leafy greens, lentils, fortified grains, seeds) with vitamin C sources to enhance absorption
Meals provide adequate calories and macronutrients for a 72kg athlete's daily performance needs
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan soccer player) requiring complete protein sources and iron-rich foods to maintain performance and energy levels
